#  Share a Snapshot of a Drawing Comparison (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher level permissions on the project's Drawings tool.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Compare Drawings (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/compare-drawings-ios)


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Navigate to the drawing comparison you want to share. See [Compare Drawings (iOS).](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/compare-drawings-ios)
  4. Tap the **Share** ![Icon Share Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7a73901ace9b5af312be471b332469bc/5bf0e9aaaf3dba1dbf0b74114dc048d1/icon-share-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.  
  
![Drawings Ios Share Drawing Snapshot](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/21007c6151508e1f83433902012f93b9/cb2b9b2d31a8d701fb28ac442bed403b/drawings-ios-share-drawing-snapshot.png?fm=webp)  

  5. Tap your preferred application for sharing the snapshot.
  6. Add the contacts to whom you want to share the snapshot.
  7. Tap **Send**.


## See Also
  * [View Drawings (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/view-drawings-ios)
  * [Email Drawings (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/email-drawings-ios)
  * [Share Drawings Within Procore (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/share-drawings-within-procore-ios)
title: Share a Snapshot of a Drawing Comparison (iOS)
description: How to share a snapshot of a drawing comparison from the Procore iOS app.
